Banner Magnets # Banner Magnets ![Banner Magnets 4 Pack](https://lag.azureedge.net/product-images/86d0a77649ab46a69ccde99b74c1f566.png) Product: Banner Magnets 4 Pack Quantity: (Min: 1, Max: 100) ![Loading product options](/includes/Images/loadingBar.gif) Loading product options... Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) [Add to Cart](javascript:__doPostBack\('ctl00$ctl00$ctl00$MainBody$MainBody$MainContent$Loader$ctl01$ctl00$AddProductToCart',''\)) * [Product Description](#af617b4d-cec1-4bb9-8e5f-1a81c64e9324) * [Product Overview](#33f2595e-fbc5-4c61-bc10-979b4332eeab) * [How To Setup](#1be35a7d-9e7a-45b6-8c89-a522dbcafac6) * [Product Images](#e40041c6-0bf3-4742-9624-3172f2787f69) Easily hang your banners with our Banner Magnets! No tools, nails, or hassle required. These strong magnets work great for both indoor and outdoor mounting. Each magnet comes with an adhesive backed mounting plate to attach to non magnetic surfaces if you wish to use indoors. Banner Magnets are sold in packs of 4. #### [Product Description](#product-descriptionCollapse) #### Banner Magnets Banner Magnets are a high-strength magnetic mounting solution designed for effortless and secure attachment to steel surfaces. Built with durability in mind, it provides a firm hold while remaining easy to reposition and reuse. Perfect for banners, signs, and displays, the Banner Magnet is ideal for retail, trade shows, events, and professional settings. #### Product Features * **Effortless Banner Hanging**: Mount [custom vinyl banners](https://www.banners.com/vinyl-banners) anywhere you want—no ropes or tools needed. These magnetic banner hangers make setup easy and quick! * **Optimal Banner Size**: Perfect for banners up to 5 ft x 10 ft. (Please note: banner material is sold separately.) * **Strong Magnetic Hold**: Each magnet can hold up to 22 lbs, ensuring your banner stays securely in place. * **Reusable & Versatile**: These budget-friendly magnetic banner hangers work on both steel and non-steel surfaces and are fully reusable. #### [Payment](#paymentCollapse) All banners must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover cards. We also accept checks, which must be received before your order is put into production. [For more information on check orders, see this article on our blog.](https://www.banners.com/resources/online-orders-pay-with-check). We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your order. #### [Shipping](#shippingCollapse) #### [Shipping Methods](#shipping-methodsCollapse) We offer the following shipping methods: \*\*\* Orders received after 5pm CST will be processed the following business day. Please note: all international shipments must have shipping labels as well as customs documentation provided by the customers. We will only accept international shipping labels from the following carriers, USPS, UPS, and FedEx. Contact a customer service rep today for more information \*\*\* Standard ( 3–5 Business Days ) Three Day ( 3 Business Days ) Two Day ( 2 Business Days ) Overnight ( 1 Business Day ) **Economy Shipping** If choosing economy shipping please add in additional postal information such as P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery. Using economy shipping can also add an additional 5 - 10 days, depending on where the package is being shipped to. *
